Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Hengshan Electromechanical Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Hengshan Electromechanical Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly deceptive 'electromechanical grocery store and distribution cabinet assembly workshop located in a residential ground-floor shop.' The official commercial system, misled by 'Electromechanical Technology' in its name and 'production of distribution cabinets and electrical appliances' at the end of its license, directly categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing.' However, physical probes and timeline backtracking directly debunk this industrial disguise: this 'fossil-level' micro-enterprise established in 1995 (nearly 30 years of history) has a paid-in capital of only 3.1 million RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is a mere '7 people.' The most fatal demotion strike comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 107, No. 8 Jizhao Garden, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' 'Jizhao Garden' is an extremely ordinary pure residential compound in downtown Nanjing. Inside a ground-floor shop or garage (Room 107) of a residential building, relying on 7 veteran employees to establish a modernized production line for electrical machinery? This is absolutely untenable in terms of physical space, environmental protection, and fire safety regulations. Carefully reviewing its lengthy business license, its core business is entirely a retail list for a building materials and hardware market: 'sales of instrumentation, wire and cable, explosion-proof electrical appliances, and labor protection supplies.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is fundamentally not a modernized major electrical manufacturing plant; it is a Micro Hardware Retailer & Switchgear Assembly Workshop hidden in the ground-floor shop of an old residential compound. The owner (Bao Wenjiong) most likely opened a hardware store selling wires, cables, and labor protection supplies, occasionally assembling a few simple distribution boxes (so-called 'production') by hand using screwdrivers and wire strippers in the shop based on customer demand.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 80)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / MICRO HARDWARE STORE & MANUAL ASSEMBLY WORKSHOP
